action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the clinical record for a specific patient ID, including species, current vitals, and documented symptoms.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier for the patient (e.g., 'F-221').

action_set_definitions.name: scan_clinic_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current levels of available medical supplies and medications in the clinic.

action_set_definitions.name: get_current_clinic_time
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulated time to track the duration of medical interventions and cycles.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_cpr_cycle
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a standardized 2-minute cycle of chest compressions and ventilation as per RECOVER guidelines.

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient receiving CPR.

ventilation_type.description: The source of ventilation used during the cycle.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_medication
action_set_definitions.description: Administers a specified dose of medication to a patient.

dose_amount.description: The quantity or dosage level to be administered.

action_set_definitions.name: assess_cardiac_monitoring
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the patient's current heart rhythm and End-Tidal CO2 (EtCO2) levels from the monitor.

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient being monitored.

state_description.patients: A dictionary where keys are patient IDs and values are objects containing species, vitals (heart_rate, respiratory_rate, temp), symptoms, and hidden health_stability scores.
state_description.clinic_resources: Available medical supplies such as 'oxygen', 'bandages', and 'epinephrine' levels.
state_description.triage_queue: List of patient IDs ordered by arrival time.

symptoms: ECG monitor displaying 'SIGNAL ERROR: CHECK ELECTRODES'
